rules.rule: Invoke cargo from a single PowerShell call: `. .\scripts\setup-env.ps1 *>&1 | Out-Null; cd src-tauri; cargo <cmd>`. Env does not persist across tool calls.
Use scoped cargo during iteration (`cargo check -p toaster --lib`, `cargo test -p toaster --lib <name>`); save full-workspace sweeps for milestone verification (2–10 min cold).
Retry a failing > 2 min cargo command a third time with the same incantation — pivot to live-app or `cargo clean -p toaster` and log under plan.md Retry log.
Verify audio/caption/preview/export fixes through the monitored live app (`scripts\launch-toaster-monitored.ps1`) or a fixture-based eval. A green `cargo check` is not verification.
Swap the <video> element source to an audio preview file. Sync preview audio independently against the original video stream.
Duplicate dual-path logic (caption layout, word grouping, filler lists, keep-segments, time mapping). One backend implementation; two consumers.
Runtime network calls to hosted ASR / LLM / caption APIs. Toaster is local-only inference. Adding a phone-home dependency requires explicit approval.
Hand-editing `src/bindings.ts` beyond a temporary one-line union patch — it is specta-generated on every `cargo tauri dev`.
Mirror every i18next key across all 20 locale files in `src/i18n/locales/`. Gated by `bun scripts/check-translations.ts`.
Respect the 800-line file cap for `.rs` / `.ts` / `.tsx` under `src/` and `src-tauri/src/`. Split, don't append to the allowlist. Gated by `bun run check:file-sizes`.
Use `anyhow::Result` over `.unwrap()` in production paths. Microseconds for backend timestamps.
Invoke the `feature-pm` skill (→ `product-manager` agent) for any multi-file change; don't jump to code without a PRD + coverage map.
Put business logic in `src-tauri/src/managers/`, not in frontend or `commands/`. Keep-segment/time-mapping authority lives in the backend.
Backend timestamps use microseconds (FFmpeg `AV_TIME_BASE`). Never `f64` seconds at module boundaries.
Use i18next keys for all UI strings — never hardcode user-visible text.
